headline: Co-Founder & CEO at Verdantly (Seed) | Ex-McKinsey | Building the API layer for carbon accounting
summary: Founder of Verdantly, a seed-stage carbon-accounting API company for manufacturing supply chains. Five years advising Fortune 500 manufacturing and logistics clients at McKinsey before founding. Raised $4.2M seed and grew the team from 2 to 22.

experience.title: Co-Founder & CEO
experience.description: Building carbon-accounting APIs for manufacturing supply chains. Raised $4.2M seed (Lowercarbon Capital, angels). Grew team from 2 to 22. Landed first 40 mid-market manufacturing customers.

experience.title: Engagement Manager, Sustainability Practice
experience.description: Advised manufacturing and logistics clients across APAC on decarbonization strategy and supply-chain emissions reporting.

education.school: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani

capabilities: Can advise on seed-stage fundraising and investor targeting
Can advise on enterprise sales motion for climate-tech / manufacturing buyers
Can advise on early-stage hiring (0 to 20 employees)
relevance_summary: Arjun is a strong contact for anyone building an enterprise or climate-tech startup selling into manufacturing: he's raised a seed round, scaled a team from 2 to 22, and spent five years inside McKinsey's manufacturing client base. He's also an active angel investor in climate tech, so worth reaching out both for fundraising advice and as a potential investor.
